name: unseen_formula_family_libation

split.criterion: libation carriers held out from ledger induction; canonical order predicted per-carrier by leave-one-carrier-out

derived_from: the OTHER libation carriers (LOO) — never the scored carrier

ranked_alternatives: 0 inversions across all LOO folds (rigid template transfers) — PRIMARY
>2 inversions (template is a small-n artefact — FAIL)
structural_predictions.failure_criterion: LOO inversion count > 2 (i.e. the induced-from-the-rest order fails to predict held-out carrier order).
structural_predictions.scoring_rule: PASS if total LOO inversions == 0. Report inversions / total_pairs.
